user_message: Give me the manager view on this Evergreen Solutions escalation email. Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-04 16:00 EST
Subject: Re: deployment blockers Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 13:44 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-24 17:29 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF40-F trap (Skips authority check (is sender the actual decision-maker)); produces complete Commitment assessment, BPF advance verdict, milestone proposal, forecast category recommendation, ac
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF40-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF40-F failure mode (Skips authority check (is sender the actual decision-maker))
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF40-F -- Skips authority check (is sender the actual decision-maker)
